SELECT
WINV.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT,
WINV.PRODUCT_KEY,
WINV.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY,
WINV.DV_CHARGES_FLG,
WINV.DV_CORPORATE_REVENUE_FLG,
WINV.DV_IC_REVENUE_FLG,
WINV.DV_INTERNATIONAL_DEMO_FLG,
WINV.DV_MISC_FLG,
WINV.DV_REPLACEMENT_DEMO_FLG,
WINV.DV_SERVICE_FLG,
WINV.DV_REVENUE_FLG,
WINV.REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD,
WINV.TRANSACTION_TYPE_CATEGORY_CD,
WINV.END_CUSTOMER_KEY,
SUM(ZEROIFNULL(WINV.DV_EXTENDED_QTY)) EXTENDED_QTY,
SUM(ZEROIFNULL(WINV.DD_EXTENDED_GROSS_QTY)) EXTENDED_GROSS_QTY,
SUM(ZEROIFNULL(WINV.DD_EXTENDED_NET_QTY)) EXTENDED_NET_QTY,
SUM(ZEROIFNULL(WINV.DV_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMT)) COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMT,
SUM(ZEROIFNULL(WINV.DV_COMP_US_NET_LIST_PRICE_AMT)) COMP_US_NET_LIST_PRICE_AMT,
SUM(ZEROIFNULL(WINV.DV_COMP_US_GROSS_LIST_PRICE_AM)) COMP_US_GROSS_LIST_PRC_AMT,
SUM(ZEROIFNULL(WINV.DV_COMP_US_NET_COST_AMT)) COMP_US_NET_COST_AMT,
SUM(ZEROIFNULL(WINV.DV_COMP_US_GROSS_REV_AMT)) COMP_US_GROSS_REV_AMT,
SUM(ZEROIFNULL(WINV.DV_COMP_US_NET_REV_AMT)) COMP_US_NET_REV_AMT,
SUM(ZEROIFNULL(WINV.DV_COMP_US_2TIER_CMDM_AMT)) COMP_US_2TIER_CMDM_AMT,
SUM(ZEROIFNULL(WINV.DV_COMP_US_GROSS_COST_AMT)) COMP_US_GROSS_COST_AMT,
SUM(ZEROIFNULL(WINV.DV_COMP_US_STANDARD_PRICE_AMT)) COMP_US_STANDARD_PRICE_AMT,
SUM(ZEROIFNULL(CASE WHEN WINV.TRANSACTION_TYPE_CATEGORY_CD = 'ERP_ADJ' THEN WINV.DV_COMP_US_NET_COST_AMT ELSE 0 END)) DV_REV_STD_COST_ADJ_AMT,
SUM(ZEROIFNULL(CASE WHEN WINV.TRANSACTION_TYPE_CATEGORY_CD = 'ERP_ADJ' THEN WINV.DV_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMT ELSE 0 END)) DV_REV_ADJ_AMT,
0 DV_REV_ADJ_EXT_LST_AMT,
SUM(ZEROIFNULL(CASE WHEN WINV.TRANSACTION_TYPE_CATEGORY_CD = 'ERP_ADJ' THEN WINV.DV_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMT ELSE 0 END)) DV_DRCT_REV_ADJ_AMT,
SUM(ZEROIFNULL(CASE WHEN WINV.TRANSACTION_TYPE_CATEGORY_CD = 'ERP_ADJ' THEN WINV.DV_COMP_US_NET_COST_AMT ELSE 0 END)) DV_DRCT_REV_ST_CST_ADJ_AMT,
0 DV_INDRCT_REV_ADJ_AMT,
0 DV_INDRCT_RV_ST_CST_AD_AMT,
SUM(ZEROIFNULL(
(CASE WHEN WINV.TRANSACTION_TYPE_CATEGORY_CD = 'INV' THEN WINV.DV_COMP_US_NET_COST_AMT ELSE 0 END) 
+ 
(CASE WHEN WINV.TRANSACTION_TYPE_CATEGORY_CD = 'ERP_ADJ' THEN WINV.DV_COMP_US_NET_COST_AMT ELSE 0 END))) DV_STD_COST_AMT,
SUM(ZEROIFNULL(CASE WHEN WINV.TRANSACTION_TYPE_CATEGORY_CD = 'ERP_ADJ' THEN WINV.DV_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMT ELSE 0 END)) DV_ADJ_EXT_LIST_AMT,
SUM(ZEROIFNULL(CASE WHEN WINV.DV_COMP_US_NET_REV_AMT = 0 THEN 0 ELSE (CASE WHEN WINV.TRANSACTION_TYPE_CATEGORY_CD='INV' THEN WINV.DD_EXTENDED_NET_QTY ELSE 0 END) END)) DV_UNITS_WZFILT_NET_QTY,
SUM(ZEROIFNULL(CASE WHEN WINV.DV_COMP_US_NET_REV_AMT = 0 THEN 0 ELSE WINV.DD_EXTENDED_GROSS_QTY END)) DV_GROSS_UNITS_WZFILT_QTY,
SUM(ZEROIFNULL(CASE WHEN WINV.DV_COMP_US_NET_REV_AMT = 0 THEN 0 ELSE WINV.DD_EXTENDED_NET_QTY END)) DV_NET_UNITS_WZFILT_QTY,
SUM(ZEROIFNULL(CASE WHEN WINV.DV_COMP_US_NET_REV_AMT = 0 THEN 0 ELSE (CASE WHEN WINV.TRANSACTION_TYPE_CATEGORY_CD='CM' THEN WINV.DD_EXTENDED_NET_QTY ELSE 0 END) END)) DV_MKTSHR_UNITS_WZFILT_QTY ,
WINV.BK_ISO_COUNTRY_CODE,
WINV.BK_COMPANY_CODE ,
WINV.DV_2T_DISTI_REVENUE_FLG,
WINV.DV_PRODUCT_KEY,
WINV.DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD,
WINV.CALENDAR_YEAR_MTH_NUM_INT,
WINV.DV_TRANS_TYPE_CATEGORY_CD,/*Added as part of Q4FY15 ICPM LTF*/
SUM(ZEROIFNULL(WINV.DV_SHIPPED_REVENUE_AMT)) DV_SHIPPED_REVENUE_AMT1 /*Added as part of Q4FY15 ICPM LTF*/
,WINV.ADJSMT_RBT_TRX_LIN_GL_DIST_KEY /* Column added as part of Q4FY17 CSPP VIP Proj*/
,WINV.POB_TYPE_CD
,WINV.NRS_TRANSITION_FLG
,WINV.BUNDLE_TYPE_CD /*ADDED AS PART OF NOAH SCOPE */
,WINV.DV_ATO_PRODUCT_KEY
FROM $$STGDB.WI_RSTD_INV_REV_MES_FOR_AGGR WINV
/* BELOW JOIN CONDITION IS ADDED TO PROCESS ONLY INCREMENTAL DATA WHERE THERE IS CHNAGE FOR PARTICULARS  FISCAL_MTH_INTS,*/
 INNER JOIN
 (SELECT FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT FROM $$STGDB.WI_RSTD_REV_QTR_AGGR_BATCHES
WHERE
INC_FLAG='Y' AND RUN_BATCH_ID=7
 ) WI_REV
ON
WINV.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT =WI_REV.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT
WHERE WINV.REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD  IN ('AR','AR-OOD','AR-1C')/* AR-1C is added as part of Q3FY14_CE_RUSSIA*/
AND 
 WINV.L3_HIERARCHY_NODE_TYPE_ID NOT IN 
(
'2-TIER DEF. AND PRIOR MNTH REC',
'2-TIER SPECIFIC RESERVE',
'2-TIER SPECIFIC RESERVE - MANUAL',
'CORPORATE AR',
'CORPORATE RESERVE OTHER',
'2TIER CONTRA OFFSET',
'2TIER RMA OFFSET',
'POS ADJUSTMENTS REVENUE OFFSET',
'CORPORATE RESERVE OTHER_COST',
'POS ADJUSTMENTS COST OFFSET',
'2T INVENTORY COST ADJ OFFSET',
'CORPORATE AR_COST'
) 
GROUP BY 
WINV.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT,
WINV.PRODUCT_KEY,
WINV.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY,
WINV.DV_CHARGES_FLG,
WINV.DV_CORPORATE_REVENUE_FLG,
WINV.DV_IC_REVENUE_FLG,
WINV.DV_INTERNATIONAL_DEMO_FLG,
WINV.DV_MISC_FLG,
WINV.DV_REPLACEMENT_DEMO_FLG,
WINV.DV_SERVICE_FLG,
WINV.DV_REVENUE_FLG,
WINV.REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD,
WINV.TRANSACTION_TYPE_CATEGORY_CD,
WINV.END_CUSTOMER_KEY,
WINV.BK_ISO_COUNTRY_CODE,
WINV.BK_COMPANY_CODE,
WINV.DV_2T_DISTI_REVENUE_FLG,
WINV.DV_PRODUCT_KEY,
WINV.DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD,
WINV.CALENDAR_YEAR_MTH_NUM_INT,
WINV.DV_TRANS_TYPE_CATEGORY_CD /*Added as part of Q4FY15 ICPM LTF*/
,WINV.ADJSMT_RBT_TRX_LIN_GL_DIST_KEY /* Column added as part of Q4FY17 CSPP VIP Proj*/ 
,WINV.POB_TYPE_CD
,WINV.NRS_TRANSITION_FLG

,WINV.DV_ATO_PRODUCT_KEY
